hero.headline: MarTech That Actually Works.
hero.subheadline: AKA Digital is the region's leading B2B marketing technology agency. Vietnam's exclusive representative for Mixpanel, Salesforce, Oracle, CleverTap, MoEngage, and more — licensed to operate across Southeast Asia.

value_proposition.headline: The MarTech Partner Southeast Asia Trusts
value_proposition.body: AKA Digital bridges the gap between world-class marketing technology and real business outcomes. As Vietnam's exclusive representative for leading global MarTech platforms — and a licensed operator across Southeast Asia — we implement, manage, and optimise the tools that turn data into measurable revenue.

media_mentions.quote: Data Solution Summit 2024: 80% of enterprises invest in software but only use 20% of functions — AKA Digital tackles this gap head-on.
Growing demand for marketing automation solutions as e-commerce businesses in Vietnam seek scalable personalisation.
Improve customer experience: how brands in Vietnam are aligning technology with customer lifecycle strategy.
Vietnam's digital marketing sector sees surge in enterprise demand for first-party data strategies.
AKA Digital positions Vietnam as a regional hub for marketing technology adoption in Southeast Asia.
MMA Smarties Silver 2022: AKA Digital's FE Credit campaign earns top honour for mobile marketing excellence.
Data-driven marketing is no longer optional — businesses that invest now will own the customer relationship.
CDP adoption in Vietnam accelerates as brands seek to reduce reliance on third-party cookies.

activities.title: Martech Summit 2026 — Agentic AI & Intelligent Action
activities.description: AKA Digital's flagship annual summit returns in 2026. This year's theme: the Agentic AI ecosystem and how autonomous AI agents are transforming marketing operations across Southeast Asia.

activities.title: Hanoi Data Solution Summit 2024
activities.description: 120 C-level executives gathered in Hanoi to explore AI-driven marketing, first-party data strategies, and the future of customer engagement across Southeast Asia.

activities.title: Martech Summit 2025
activities.description: AKA Digital hosted Vietnam's premier annual MarTech event — From Data Chaos to Performance Delivery. Leading brands discuss AI, automation, and zero-party data.

activities.title: Martech Summit 2024 — Look Back
activities.description: Hundreds of marketing leaders joined AKA Digital for a deep dive into personalisation at scale, CDP architecture, and the evolving MarTech landscape.

activities.title: Martech Innovation Day 2023
activities.description: A landmark industry gathering showcasing the latest innovations in marketing automation, analytics, and customer data platforms in Vietnam.

activities.title: MMA Smarties Awards 2022
activities.description: AKA Digital's campaign for FE Credit earned Silver at the MMA Smarties Awards — Southeast Asia's premier mobile marketing recognition.

activities.title: CDP Deepdive Workshop
activities.description: In collaboration with mParticle — an intensive workshop for heads of technology and marketing exploring Customer Data Platform architecture.

activities.title: Mixpanel vs. GA4 Roundtable
activities.description: Product, Data, and Marketing leaders debated the role of real-time insights in growth — and when to choose Mixpanel over Google Analytics.

activities.title: DSS 2024 — Partner Workshop
activities.description: Exclusive breakout sessions with Mixpanel, mParticle, Netcore, and OneSignal — hands-on demos and architecture sessions for enterprise teams.
